title: sorbus subulata
intro: Sorbus subulata, also known as the Tibetan rowan or Chinese rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sorbus subulata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Sorbus subulata is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
